economic_notes: Dokis First Nation holds 99.5% interest in Migisi Hydro L.P. and has investment in Migisi Development Corporation. Also holds investment in Ontario First Nation Sovereign Wealth L.P. Five inactive subsidiaries: Dokis Forestry Corporation Inc., Migisi Power Corporation, Migisi Power Authority Inc., Migisi Utility Authority Inc., Migisi Tax Authority Inc.
notes: Revenue includes deferred contributions from beginning of year ($3,975,991) rolled into total revenue per the statement of operations format. Deferred contributions at end of year ($5,735,522) are deducted to arrive at excess of revenues over expenses before undernoted item. First Nation share of Migisi Development Corporation earnings of $401,839 is recorded as a separate line item below operating surplus. Five inactive subsidiaries are fully consolidated. Migisi Hydro L.P. and Migisi Development Corporation accounted for using modified equity method. Note receivable from Migisi Development Corporation of $2,288,921 is non-interest-bearing and due on demand.
